title: Opendoor (OPEN) Stock Edges Higher as Strong Housing Data Lifts Sentiment
text: Opendoor (OPEN) Stock Edges Higher as Strong Housing Data Lifts Sentiment. Opendoor's stock edged higher in May 2026 as positive housing data helped lift sentiment ahead of Q1 earnings. Despite broader market headwinds, recent housing starts and building permit data showed signs of resilience, providing some optimism that the prolonged downturn may be moderating. For Opendoor, any evidence of housing market recovery supports the bullish case for the stock, particularly given the company's focus on growing acquisition volumes and market share. Management had indicated that market conditions, while still challenging, were showing signs of stabilization in recent months. The stock's responsiveness to positive housing data reflected investor expectations that improving market conditions would enhance Opendoor's ability to execute on its profitability roadmap.
